commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=78491c7255ed570fc6c31865add4700f6800d086)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bounded chat.history display projections, messages/turns/raw-messages modes, WebChat turns requests, Swift protocol updates, docs, tests, and a package-list script fix.

PR surface: Source +1052, Tests +904, Docs +3, Other +43. Total +2002 across 17 files.

Reproducibility: no. not with high confidence from this read-only pass. The current-main source and PR evidence support the oversized/sensitive chat.history problem, but this PR still lacks current-head real user-path proof.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the PR is missing contributor real behavior proof and changes protocol defaults, session persistence, and raw transcript access.

target.title: AI-assisted: fix(chat): bound chat history display payloads
target.body:
## Summary

Supersedes #86458 with a fresh branch on the current `release/2026.5.26` head so CI and automated review evaluate one clean evidence chain.

This fixes `chat.history` display payload growth by routing normal display responses through bounded, safe projections while preserving raw transcript access only through explicit admin `raw-messages` mode.

AI-assisted change: yes. Forge/Codex produced the implementation and replacement PR publication using OpenAI Codex `gpt-5.5` in the OpenClaw workspace. Operator requested the old PR be closed and replaced after the review state on #86458 became stale.

## Current Branch Evidence

- Base: current `origin/release/2026.5.26` at `13436ca463`
- Head: pushed after the v2 review pass added the `unsafeRawToolPayloads` warn-log fix
- Scope: 9 commits, 17 files
- Dependency churn: none in package, lockfile, or shrinkwrap files

## Validation

```bash
git diff --check origin/release/2026.5.26...HEAD
pnpm vitest run \
  src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts \
  src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts \
  src/gateway/session-utils.fs.test.ts \
  test/scripts/list-prod-store-packages.test.ts \
  ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts \
  ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts \
  --reporter=dot
```

Observed result:

```text
git diff --check: PASS
Test Files: 8 passed
Tests: 401 passed
```

Focused chat-history suite after the warn-log addition:

```text
src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts: 35 passed
src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts:   29 passed
```

## Behavior Covered

- Adds bounded chat display projection helpers for text, tool payloads, media, and canvas blocks.
- Routes normal `chat.history` display responses through bounded projections.
- Adds and documents `mode: "messages" | "turns" | "raw-messages"`.
- Gates raw payload inspection behind explicit admin raw mode.
- Keeps `unsafeRawToolPayloads` schema-compatible without allowing it to bypass safe `messages` projection.
- Emits a `logGateway.warn` when `unsafeRawToolPayloads=true` is sent without `mode === "raw-messages"`, so stale callers are observable instead of silently downgraded.
- Preserves safe `messages` mode text up to configured `maxHistoryBytes` after tool payload omission.
- Regenerates Swift protocol models from canonical schema output.
- Adds regression tests for bounded payloads, media shaping, visible turn preservation, placeholder semantics, saturated scan-window metadata, large safe text preservation, and raw-mode authorization.

## Known Limitations and Deferred Work

These are intentional scope decisions for this PR, called out explicitly so reviewers and operators can plan follow-ups.

- **Turns mode read window does not scale with `limit`.** `scanMax = hardMax` (1000) is used for `mode: "turns"` regardless of the caller's requested `limit`. The turn grouper needs a full window to pair tool calls with their results across the limit boundary, and a small-limit read window can split turns and produce inconsistent `displayItemsReturned`/`hasMoreBefore`. The latency win for small `limit` values in turns mode is therefore zero; the `chat.history metrics` telemetry exposes this via `scanMax`, `readMs`, and `readMode=full-tail`. A future PR can introduce a turn-aware tail reader that grows the window only as far as needed to close the last partial turn.

- **`raw-messages` mode is still byte-capped by `maxHistoryBytes`.** Admin diagnostic reads in `raw-messages` mode still flow through `replaceOversizedChatHistoryMessages`, `capArrayByJsonBytes`, and `enforceChatHistoryFinalBudget`. Very large tool payloads can still be replaced with placeholders or trimmed to fit the final history budget. This preserves availability guarantees for the response writer, but it means raw mode is not a guaranteed full-fidelity transcript view. A widened admin diagnostic budget or a paginated cursor for raw mode is a follow-up if operators need full payload bytes.

- **`unsafeRawToolPayloads` schema field is a deprecated no-op shim.** It is accepted for backwards compatibility and now warn-logged when sent without the matching mode, but it has no behavioral effect on its own. Removing the field from the schema is deferred to a follow-up alongside Swift/UI client cleanup.

## Replacement Note

#86458 is closed as superseded because repeated base movement and force-push repairs left stale review/CI context on that PR. This PR should be treated as the clean review target.
